And we've actually, we use this ourselves. So if you call in to my office and you get on the phone with us and you don't buy right then and there, which is, you know, not necessarily, you know, totally uncommon, we actually send you a copy of our most recent newsletter, which you may already have because you're probably on our list, but just in case. We send you a handwritten card thanking you for the call, and then we include a CD. So it's, we usually send one of our CDs that we send out to our clients, and we put a little note about why we're sending the CD. And it's something like, hey, we really enjoyed talking with you, and, you know, we thought you would enjoy the CD. And we've got, so our CDs, we've been interviewing contestants who are on Shark Tank. So people who went on and either got a deal or didn't get a deal. So we've been interviewing them and finding out what's happened after the show and how their business is going and some business advice. And so, you know, we've got, I don't know, six or eight of those now, and we will find one that we think is relevant to that person out of those six or eight, and then send that over to them, just as, you know, I mean, there's no pitch on it for us, it's just a free content. And that's been working really well. We've been getting a lot of great feedback, and we know we've gotten actually, we know, that's something we've been doing very, it's pretty recent, but we know for sure we've gotten one referral out of it as well. And then the final thing that's new, that is pretty new in the market is variable picture data. And so this is pretty cool, and it's something that we're still testing, but it's where you can like, let's say it's Halloween, and you can put a picture in there of a pumpkin and I can carve for your newsletter, Dave, I can carve your name in it, it can say Dave, carved in the pumpkin, and when I get mine, it says Sean. And so that's kind of cool, makes it, you know, interesting, and you can do all sorts of cool stuff with that. So, I mean, those are some unique ways I see people using newsletters to kind of change it up, get noticed, get more business, get more referrals. Fantastic, fantastic man. So we're running up against the clock here. So do you have any final piece of advice that you could give to folks who are, the folks who are listening to this bonus interview right now? Yeah, I would say that, I'd probably tell you that most business owners, and even myself a number of years ago, I was always looking for that next big shiny object, and it usually focused on what can I do to get new people in the door. And I think that's the wrong approach. We obviously all need to get new clients in, okay, so it's not like you can't try to get new people in, but we're missing out on, you know, so many opportunities for referrals and repeat business and upsells and cross-sells. There was a McKenzie group study that shows that the average repeat customer spends 214% more than a new customer. And, you know, referrals are really so much more inclined to do more business with you quicker, and to kind of get in and take your products and services and say yes, then just someone cold off the street who found you by Googling you, or because you sent them a postcard or something. You know, and I think that people are missing the boat if they would spend a little more time focusing on existing customers, and a little more time focusing on referrals, they could find their business, you know, increasing at percentages they've never seen before. I can tell you our referral contest, we fully expect to get 50, 60 people minimum out of it. I mean, I would be surprised if we didn't get even more than that, but we fully expect, we're actually planning on two trips, it's gonna take us two trips to go and do it because there's only people. And that's just based off of previous referral contests, and it's such a great way to grow, and typically there's so much, referrals are just better clients for us. They sign up quicker, and they follow the program better, and then they usually also refer, which is really like double bonus. So, yeah, stop doing what everyone else is doing and focusing on all the shiny objects, and start focusing on existing clients, getting more referrals, decreasing the sharing of clients, which we didn't go over, but with other vendors who offer your similar product or service, I think you'll do well to spend a little time on that. Absolutely, you would, and that's really great advice. Sean, even though you gave out a ton of great content on this bonus CD, if people wanna learn more, you have some additional content that they can get as well, and some additional training, how folks can get that, and what exactly is it? So definitely, like I said, no shipping, no cost, not even a penny, just putting your information and I'll have my office send it over to you. So as I said, that's gkic.com forward slash newsletter pro.
